cards.name: Aang, the Last Airbender
cards.reason: Ultimate flyer that provides evasion and card draw — impossible to race

cards.name: Azula, Blue Flame Prodigy
cards.reason: Aggressive threat that chi-blocks blockers and deals massive burn damage

cards.name: Toph, Beifong Scion
cards.reason: Generates 3/3 Earth Wall tokens every time you play a land or ramp

cards.name: Avatar State
cards.reason: Massive board wipe that saves your best creature; game-winning reset

cards.name: Zuko, Fire Nation Exile
cards.reason: Aggressive lord for Fire Nation decks that grows with every bending spell

cards.name: Sokka's Boomerang
cards.reason: Equipment that can be 'thrown' for damage and returns to hand for value

cards.name: Appa, Sky Bison
cards.reason: Large flyer that can transport your entire team for a lethal air strike

cards.name: Iroh's Wisdom
cards.reason: Draws cards and provides a burst of mana for Fire Nation aggro

cards.name: Dai Li Arrest
cards.reason: Efficient removal that exiles the target, ignoring death triggers

cards.name: Katara, Master Healer
cards.reason: Key engine for flyers; protects your air team and provides lifegain

tiers.label: Good Playables
tiers.description: Solid cards that make every deck better

cards.name: Kyoshi Warrior
cards.reason: Solid Ally with protection abilities — key for go-wide decks

cards.name: Fire Nation Soldier
cards.reason: Efficient aggressive creature that enables firebending synergies

cards.name: Cabbage Cart
cards.reason: Generates Clues for 'Draw Two' and 'Sacrifice' archetypes

cards.name: Spirit Portal
cards.reason: Excellent mana fixing for 3+ color ramp strategies

cards.name: Momo's Scout
cards.reason: Cheap flyer that provides repeatable card filtering

cards.name: Earth Kingdom Wall
cards.reason: Defensive staple that helps reach the long game for ramp decks

cards.name: Bending Lesson
cards.reason: Lesson card that's decent but requires a setup to be high value

cards.name: Glider Flight
cards.reason: Provides temporary evasion for go-wide attacks

tiers.label: Sideboard / Avoid
tiers.description: Only play if desperate or as sideboard cards

cards.name: Cactus Juice
cards.reason: Too unpredictable; the downside often outweighs the benefit

cards.name: Broken Sled
cards.reason: Narrow artifact with very little impact on the board

tiers.label: Unplayable
tiers.description: Never put these in your deck

cards.name: Merchant's Misfortune
cards.reason: Terrible card disadvantage for very little gain
